Scope decision made: shared-daemon Docker is explicitly unsupported for containment. The security model (session.go:869, threat-matrix.md:87, tier3-docker-sandboxes.md:261) treats host daemon access as categorically incompatible with containment. v1 is clear unsupported-project handling with code-only session workflow, not safe shared-daemon mode.
